name: Hungarian Chocolate Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate in a saucepan over low heat, stirring constantly until smooth.
2. Pour the melted chocolate into a mixing bowl.
3. Add the powdered sugar and hot water to the chocolate mixture all at once and blend well.
4. Add the egg to the mixture and blend thoroughly.
5. Add the butter one tablespoon at a time, beating the frosting after each addition.
6. If the frosting is too thin to spread, place it in the refrigerator until the desired consistency is reached.
Makes enough frosting to cover the top, bottom, and sides of two 8-inch or 9-inch layer cakes, or the top, bottom, and sides of one 9x13-inch sheet cake or a 10-inch tube cake.
